description: Ground truth for 10-extractor system on Samuel Cloutier intro call (2026-05-13). Note: Granola recording stopped ~10 min in; Walkers UK referrer correction, Windhelm lost-stage, Sarah Marfire/Aaron Unterman competitor names, Isabel/Rishma/Prabha CIMA contacts, and VASP article title pivot are off-record. This eval covers only facts present in the captured transcript.
off_record_facts: Walkers UK (Melissa Lim) as Cashi referrer — correction of 'Walkers Corporate' in CRM
Windhelm Finance = Lost stage (CRM shows Pricing sent)
Paxos referral via Petri not McVey
Sarah Marfire and Aaron Unterman as named competitors
Isabel (CIMA VASP head), Rishma, Prabha as CIMA personal contacts Sam offered
VASP article title pivot to 'What's in the Pipeline'

assertions.description: Lunar Rails identified as active VASP deal
assertions.transcript_quote: I have lunar rails and cache
assertions.check: JSON contains an entry for 'Lunar Rails' (or 'lunar-rails') as an active or existing VASP/deal

assertions.description: Cashy (or Cashi) identified as active VASP deal
assertions.transcript_quote: I have lunar rails and cache
assertions.check: JSON contains an entry for 'Cashy' or 'Cashi' as an active or existing VASP/deal

assertions.description: Unnamed third VASP prospect (lending solution) identified
assertions.transcript_quote: I have one now that's providing kind of a lending solution
assertions.check: JSON contains a third VASP entry described as a lending solution or prospect

assertions.description: VASP pricing base is $40K for 1-2 VASPs
assertions.transcript_quote: I'm at the 40 level now with the two that I have
assertions.check: JSON captures a $40,000 base price tier for 1-2 VASPs

assertions.description: VASP pricing increases to $50K at 3 VASPs
assertions.transcript_quote: I might switch to 50. And once I hit three
assertions.check: JSON captures a $50,000 price tier at or around 3 VASPs

assertions.transcript_quote: if I hit 45 vasps, I think if I go up to 60, 65k
assertions.check: JSON captures a $60K-$65K price tier at 4-5 VASPs

assertions.transcript_quote: if I hit eight nine, I'm gonna get 100K
assertions.check: JSON captures a $100,000 price tier at 8-9 VASPs

assertions.description: Sam commits to sending list of 24 CIMA-registered VASPs
assertions.transcript_quote: I'm gonna send you the list of vasps that are regulated in Kmat. There's 24 of them.
assertions.check: JSON contains an action item owned by the counterparty (Sam) to send a list of 24 CIMA-regulated VASPs

assertions.description: Anoop to research the 24 VASPs / source leads from VASP market
assertions.transcript_quote: you probably have a hit list of companies that you've looked at
assertions.check: JSON contains an action item owned by the operator (Anoop) to research VASPs or build a hit list

assertions.description: ICP: UK-license veterans exiting to Cayman are prime VASP prospects
assertions.transcript_quote: Lots of exodus from the UK. If you hear we're in crypto, we applied for UK license. It was hell. Boom. That's target.
assertions.check: JSON captures UK-licensed crypto firms expanding to Cayman as a target ICP segment

assertions.description: ICP: Dubai-regulated firms expanding to North American markets
assertions.transcript_quote: oh, we have a license in Dubai. You know, time zones making it hard. We want to expand North American markets. Target.
assertions.check: JSON captures Dubai-licensed firms as a target ICP segment

assertions.description: ICP: Money transmitter licenses expanding Caribbean/LATAM
assertions.transcript_quote: any kind of money transmitter license that wants to expand in, like, caribbean, South America
assertions.check: JSON captures money transmitter licenses expanding to Caribbean/LATAM as a target segment

assertions.description: Anti-ICP: DAOs, gaming, degen projects should go to Josh
assertions.transcript_quote: Josh is the kind of DAO slash gaming slash. Dare I say degen... And I do not.
assertions.check: JSON captures DAOs/gaming/degen as anti-ICP (route to Josh) or excluded segment for Sam

assertions.description: Sam's capacity ceiling is ~10 VASPs; not building a large desk
assertions.transcript_quote: Ideally, I would have seven regulated vasps on my desk, eight, nine, 10. 10 is my max.
assertions.check: JSON notes Sam's stated capacity ceiling of 10 VASPs

assertions.description: Sam was ill with a viral cold after returning from a conference trip
assertions.transcript_quote: I got killed with sickness yesterday. Full day out with just, like, daggers in my throat.
assertions.check: JSON notes Sam was sick/had a viral cold following a conference trip

assertions.description: Sam wrote the Cayman VASP legislation and spent 7 years inside the Ministry of Financial Services
assertions.transcript_quote: I wrote the legislation. I spent seven years working with the regulator. You know, if I know every single person there.
assertions.check: JSON captures that Sam authored the Cayman VASP legislation and has deep regulatory insider access

assertions.description: Only 24-40 VASP registrations exist in Cayman; Sam holds ~7% of the market with 2 clients
assertions.transcript_quote: there might be 30 entities. 40 in the jurisdiction. So I've got two right now.
assertions.check: JSON captures the market size fact: ~30-40 total VASP registrations in Cayman, Sam has 2
